title: Anticipatory Bail to Pawan Khera in Alleged Defamation Case Linked to Assam CM's Wife
description: This comes after earlier on Thursday, Supreme Court had reserved its verdict on a plea filed by Congress leader Pawan Khera challenging a Gauhati High Court order denying him anticipatory bail in a defamation and forgery case linked to allegations against Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma
